ManagedContentType.description: FAQ items displayed on the Help and Support page. Each record is one question/answer pair. The answer field supports rich text with inline images for detailed explanations.

managedContentNodeTypes.helpText: The FAQ question displayed as the accordion heading.
managedContentNodeTypes.placeholderText: e.g. How does the Library work?

managedContentNodeTypes.helpText: Rich text answer. Supports bold, italic, lists, links, and inline images for screenshots or diagrams.
Zero-padded number controlling display order (e.g. 010, 020, 030). Use gaps of 10 so new items can be inserted without renumbering.
Optional grouping label (e.g. "Getting Started", "Library", "Account"). Leave blank to show in a single ungrouped list.
